routes.title: Home
routes.description: Landing page with the Elixio marketplace overview.

routes.title: Explore
routes.description: Browse all digital assets for sale. Filter by category, price, rating.

routes.title: Library
routes.description: Your purchased assets and download history. Buyers only.

routes.title: Start Selling
routes.description: Information about becoming a creator and the selling workflow.

routes.title: Public Stats
routes.description: Live marketplace stats: total assets, creators, sales, GMV. Updates every 60 seconds.

routes.title: Documentation
routes.description: Comprehensive documentation: architecture, security, tax, i18n, theme, deployment, testing.

routes.title: Blog
routes.description: Articles about digital products, selling tips, marketplace trends. Auto-published twice a week.

routes.title: Help Chat
routes.description: Fullscreen AI assistant trained on Elixio's knowledge base. Ask anything about the platform.

routes.title: Creator Dashboard
routes.description: Revenue, top assets, conversion, cohort retention. Creators only.

routes.title: AI Studio
routes.description: AI tools for creators: listing copywriter, asset critique, sales coach, metadata SEO. Creators only.

routes.title: Bulk Operations
routes.description: Update many assets at once. Creators only.

routes.title: Your Profile
routes.description: Manage your account, security, notifications, privacy, and data.

routes.title: Account Settings
routes.description: Edit your display name, bio, and avatar URL.

routes.title: Security Settings
routes.description: Manage password, MFA, passkeys, OAuth accounts, active sessions.

routes.title: Notification Preferences
routes.description: Choose which emails you receive: order receipts, security alerts, product updates, marketing.

routes.title: Privacy and Data
routes.description: Export your data, manage cookie consent, exercise your GDPR/CCPA rights.

routes.title: Delete Account
routes.description: Permanently delete your account. 30-day grace period.

routes.title: Sign In
routes.description: Sign in with email + password, magic link, Google, GitHub, or passkey.

routes.title: Create Account
routes.description: Choose buyer or creator signup.

routes.title: Buyer Signup
routes.description: Create a buyer account to purchase digital products.

routes.title: Creator Signup
routes.description: Create a creator account to sell your digital products.

routes.title: Reset Password
routes.description: Set a new password if you forgot your current one.

routes.title: Set Up 2FA
routes.description: Enable two-factor authentication with an authenticator app.

routes.title: Privacy Policy
routes.description: How we collect, use, and protect your data. GDPR-compliant.

routes.title: Terms of Service
routes.description: The legal agreement between you and Elixio Digital.

routes.title: Cookie Policy
routes.description: What cookies we use and why.
